paragraphs.label: Weather improvement and choosing a topic to discuss

sentences.text: Because I the weather the the weather is great.
It has it has improved because in the during the winter, it was it was was very cold.
So so I'm happy because we have a sunny day.
I thought that it would be very interesting to to to speak.
Constant digital constant constant digital notifications, emails, news outlets, and text messages from friends are a come are are a common distraction when we are trying to work or study.
In fact, getting a single smartphone notification could disrupt your concentration for around seven seconds.

That's according to a recent study published in computers in human behavior in which behavior behavior in which 118 university students were split into three groups to take part in Stroop takes tasks tasks tasks.
During Stroop tasks, participations are shown the word for a color, but the font will be in a different color.
For example, they will see the word green but written in red letters.

paragraphs.label: Benefits of turning off phone notifications for concentration

sentences.text: It's one step to to achieve my goal, let's say, if it is a goal.
When I started to to get off my notifications, I felt this this sensation this sensation of of of losing something.
But I but now I consider that if something is really important something is really important, someone will will get to me.
But but when what we nowadays, we have a lot of notifications about Use or situations that's that are not so important.
So the world creates a lot of informations that that are that are that are unnecessary to to our lives.
So if I if I could eliminate if I could get off, let's say, 40% of this type of information, I think it was a great choice.
It's difficult to to to say, but one hour, two hours, it depends on day because because I've never thought about it.
But now I use my phone, first of all, to to get more informations about language learning.
To get more information about what I really need, and I think I because of that I I don't lose time that I would lose if I reinstall notifications.

paragraphs.label: Not using phone notifications and Twitter usage habits

sentences.text: I turned out my notifications, like, five or six years ago, and I've never thought about about coming back.
So so if it's not necessary, I don't consider it.
If in the future, it is necessary, I will turn on my notifications.
But in this moment, I I have not encountered any reason to to to return.
So I've been using it or I've been not using it for, like, say, six six years.
And and I wish it could it could go ahead.
I use first of all, I use Twitter.
It is named, like, now how can we do not x x.
So if I try to I try I try to I try to be conscious about it and don't use a lot of of Twitter.
But I know I noticed that if I have a free time and I don't have
and I I do have not nothing to do, I I something start to to use Twitter.
And if you are you can you can get lost in this, you know, using it, reading for forty minutes, one hour, and it don't help you at the end.

paragraphs.label: Phone distractions during school exams and scam calls

sentences.text: And in this moment, I need to be concentrated because it was a very complicated exam, and I lost, like I I lost, like, five or ten minutes and it max, if I'm not wrong.
So I've never been good at at yeah.
So to to pass every maths exam, I needed to be very concentrated, very prepared, and with every disruption that's that's occurs occurs.
At the end of the day, it was impossible to pass this exam because of a lot of distractions.
So it's a it has showed me that that that you need to be that even a small signal can can straight things down.
And in in Poland, in this now we received a lot of calls from from not not thieves, but
but, you know, people who who has received your number and try to scammer oh, scammers.
Scammers from from banks that that they they say that they they are working in in a in a bank and your account has lost everything.
You need to you need to help them to giving giving them your password and everything.
